issue.message: Call requires permission which may be rejected by user: code should explicitly check to see if permission is available (with `checkPermission`) or explicitly handle a potential `SecurityException`
Call requires permission which may be rejected by user: code should explicitly check to see if permission is available (with `checkPermission`) or explicitly handle a potential `SecurityException`
Call requires permission which may be rejected by user: code should explicitly check to see if permission is available (with `checkPermission`) or explicitly handle a potential `SecurityException`
Field requires API level 30 (current min is 29): `android.content.pm.ServiceInfo#FOREGROUND_SERVICE_TYPE_MICROPHONE`
Field requires API level 33 (current min is 26): `android.content.Context#RECEIVER_EXPORTED`
Class requires API level 29 (current min is 26): `android.telephony.CellInfoNr`

Must be one of: AudioAttributes.USAGE_UNKNOWN, AudioAttributes.USAGE_MEDIA, AudioAttributes.USAGE_VOICE_COMMUNICATION, AudioAttributes.USAGE_VOICE_COMMUNICATION_SIGNALLING, AudioAttributes.USAGE_ALARM, AudioAttributes.USAGE_NOTIFICATION, AudioAttributes.USAGE_NOTIFICATION_RINGTONE, AudioAttributes.USAGE_NOTIFICATION_COMMUNICATION_REQUEST, AudioAttributes.USAGE_NOTIFICATION_COMMUNICATION_INSTANT, AudioAttributes.USAGE_NOTIFICATION_COMMUNICATION_DELAYED, AudioAttributes.USAGE_NOTIFICATION_EVENT, AudioAttributes.USAGE_ASSISTANCE_ACCESSIBILITY, AudioAttributes.USAGE_ASSISTANCE_NAVIGATION_GUIDANCE, AudioAttributes.USAGE_ASSISTANCE_SONIFICATION, AudioAttributes.USAGE_GAME, AudioAttributes.USAGE_ASSISTANT

Use of `REQUEST_IGNORE_BATTERY_OPTIMIZATIONS` violates the Play Store Content Policy regarding acceptable use cases, as described in https://developer.android.com/training/monitoring-device-state/doze-standby.html
A newer version of androidx.core:core-ktx than 1.12.0 is available: 1.19.0
A newer version of androidx.appcompat:appcompat than 1.6.1 is available: 1.7.1
A newer version of com.google.android.material:material than 1.11.0 is available: 1.14.0
A newer version of androidx.constraintlayout:constraintlayout than 2.1.4 is available: 2.2.1
A newer version of androidx.test.ext:junit than 1.1.5 is available: 1.3.0
A newer version of androidx.test.espresso:espresso-core than 3.5.1 is available: 3.7.0

Switch statement on an `int` with known associated constant missing case `Call.STATE_AUDIO_PROCESSING`, `Call.STATE_DISCONNECTED`, `Call.STATE_DISCONNECTING`, `Call.STATE_HOLDING`, `Call.STATE_NEW`, `Call.STATE_PULLING_CALL`, `Call.STATE_SELECT_PHONE_ACCOUNT`, `Call.STATE_SIMULATED_RINGING`
Must use `app:tint` instead of `android:tint`
Must use `app:tint` instead of `android:tint`
Must use `app:tint` instead of `android:tint`
Permission exists without corresponding hardware `<uses-feature android:name="android.hardware.telephony" required="false">` tag
Permission exists without corresponding hardware `<uses-feature android:name="android.hardware.telephony" required="false">` tag
Permission exists without corresponding hardware `<uses-feature android:name="android.hardware.telephony" required="false">` tag
Using `getLine1Number` to get device identifiers is not recommended
Using `getString` to get device identifiers is not recommended

The attribute `android:allowBackup` is deprecated from Android 12 and higher and may be removed in future versions. Consider adding the attribute `android:dataExtractionRules` specifying an `@xml` resource which configures cloud backups and device transfers on Android 12 and higher.

Provide a timeout when requesting a wakelock with `PowerManager.Wakelock.acquire(long timeout)`. This will ensure the OS will cleanup any wakelocks that last longer than you intend, and will save your user's battery.
This folder configuration (`v26`) is unnecessary; `minSdkVersion` is 26. Merge all the resources in this folder into `mipmap-anydpi`.
Do not place Android context classes in static fields (static reference to `GsmCallManager` which has field `inCallService` pointing to `InCallService`); this is a memory leak
Do not place Android context classes in static fields; this is a memory leak
issue.errorLine1: @Volatile var inCallService: InCallService? = null; private set

issue.message: Very long vector path (1197 characters), which is bad for performance. Considering reducing precision, removing minor details or rasterizing vector.
Very long vector path (848 characters), which is bad for performance. Considering reducing precision, removing minor details or rasterizing vector.
Very long vector path (972 characters), which is bad for performance. Considering reducing precision, removing minor details or rasterizing vector.
Set `android:baselineAligned="false"` on this element for better performance
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `@color/background` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.SipGsmGateway`)
The resource `R.drawable.ic_notification` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.notification_title` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.notification_text_registered` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.notification_text_unregistered` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.notification_text_call` appears to be unused
`activity_main.xml` has more than 80 views, bad for performance
Launcher icons should not fill every pixel of their square region; see the design guide for details
Launcher icons should not fill every pixel of their square region; see the design guide for details
Launcher icons should not fill every pixel of their square region; see the design guide for details
Launcher icons should not fill every pixel of their square region; see the design guide for details
Launcher icons should not fill every pixel of their square region; see the design guide for details

Launcher icon used as round icon did not have a circular shape
Launcher icon used as round icon did not have a circular shape
Launcher icon used as round icon did not have a circular shape
Launcher icon used as round icon did not have a circular shape
The application adaptive icon is missing a monochrome tag
The application adaptive roundIcon is missing a monochrome tag
Found bitmap drawable `res/drawable/ic_launcher_foreground.png` in densityless folder

Buttons in button bars should be borderless; use `style="?android:attr/buttonBarButtonStyle"` (and `?android:attr/buttonBarStyle` on the parent)
Buttons in button bars should be borderless; use `style="?android:attr/buttonBarButtonStyle"` (and `?android:attr/buttonBarStyle` on the parent)

Buttons in button bars should be borderless; use `style="?android:attr/buttonBarButtonStyle"` (and `?android:attr/buttonBarStyle` on the parent)
Custom view ``TextView`` has `setOnTouchListener` called on it but does not override `performClick`
`onTouch` lambda should call `View#performClick` when a click is detected
